text.title: JUnit Testing Examples
text.summary: Controller slice test with MockMvc, service unit test with Mockito, and async assertion with Awaitility.

example.note: @WebMvcTest loads only the web layer. @MockBean on UserService — the service is mocked, not real.
No Spring context. @ExtendWith(MockitoExtension.class) only. @InjectMocks constructs the real service.
Awaitility replaces Thread.sleep. future::isDone is a Callable; Awaitility polls it.

example.code: Thread.sleep(2000); // flaky under CI load assertThat(future.isDone()).isTrue();
example.note: Thread.sleep is a fixed wait; the async task may complete in 200ms or 3000ms depending on load.
